offline_banner: Offline — aapki progress isi device par save hai.
onb_subtitle: A1 se C1 tak French seekho — Indian learners ke liye.
onb_p1: Hindi aur English ke bridges se French seekho
onb_p2: Poori tarah offline — koi account nahi
onb_p3: Smart spaced repetition bhooli hui baatein yaad rakhta hai
onb_p4: Aapki duniya ke examples: dal, Diwali, Mumbai…
onb_p5: Ek din miss ho gaya? Streak freezes aapki streak bachate hain (3 free)
onb_footnote: Aapki progress isi device par save hoti hai.
onb_native_desc: French words ka meaning pehle aapki language mein dikhega.
onb_goal_desc: Home screen aur daily goal aapke hisaab se set honge.
onb_rhythm_desc: Settings mein kabhi bhi change kar sakte ho.
onb_sovereignty_1: Saari progress sirf is device par — koi account nahi.
onb_sovereignty_2: Settings se kabhi bhi JSON backup export karo.
onb_sovereignty_3: Launch par koi telemetry nahi. Cloud sync baad mein optional aur encrypted hoga.
onb_ready_desc: Aapka personalised French path ready hai.
settings_sovereignty_desc: Jab tak export na karo, sab kuch isi device par rehta hai.
home_subtitle: Indian learners ke liye French · A1 → C1
home_locked_hint: Unlock karne ke liye pichhla lesson complete karo.
delf_desc: Chaaron skills test karo aur dekho pass hoge ya nahi.
lesson_locked_desc: Pehle apne path ke pichhle lessons complete karo.
lesson_srs_note: Ye shabd ab spaced repetition ke saath aapki review queue mein hain.
progress_subtitle: Sab kuchh isi device par — koi account nahi.
onb_beta: Beta — French content AI-authored hai. Native proof-read chal raha hai.
review_nothing_desc: Review queue mein cards add karne ke liye ek lesson complete karo.
exam_intro_desc: Chaar skills, har ek 25 points (total 100). Pass ke liye 50/100 chahiye — par kisi ek skill mein 5/25 se kam aane par poora exam fail.
exam_self_assess: Self-assess karo (jo kiya use tick karo):
exam_eliminated: note éliminatoire se fail: kisi skill mein 5/25 se kam score.
review_fsrs_tip: Be honest — "Again" isn't failure; it's how FSRS learns your memory curve.
lesson_try_again: Bilkul sahi nahi — dobara try karo.
dictation_prompt: Sunno aur jo aap suno use type karo
dictation_fill_blank: Jo aap suno use type karo
review_loading: Review queue load ho rahi hai…
settings_sovereignty_item_ondevice: Progress, reviews, aur settings: sirf device par
settings_sovereignty_item_export: Export: JSON backup, jo aapke control mein hai
settings_sovereignty_doc: Poora sovereignty model jaanne ke liye project repo mein docs/data-sovereignty.md dekho.
settings_tts_desc: Saara pronunciation sirf French voices mein — kabhi English TTS nahi.
settings_storage_notice: Koi account nahi, koi cloud nahi — aapka learning data sirf isi device par hai. Progress na kho, isliye regularly export karo.
settings_reset_confirm_desc: Is device par saari progress erase karein? Ye undo nahi ho sakta.
settings_import_preview_title: Device ka saara data replace karein?
settings_import_preview_summary: Export ho gaya: {date} · {lessons} lessons · {cards} review cards
settings_import_preview_warning: Isse aapki current progress erase ho jayegi aur backup se replace ho jayegi.
settings_notif_denied_hint: Notifications allow nahi hui. Revision reminders paane ke liye browser settings mein inhe on karo.
settings_notif_unsupported: Is browser mein notifications support nahi hoti.
settings_notif_enable_first: Pehle browser settings mein notifications on karo.
settings_persist_granted: Storage ab persistent hai — aapka data eviction se safe hai.
settings_persist_denied: Browser ne persistent storage nahi di. Aapka data phir bhi saved hai (best-effort).
settings_file_too_large: File bahut badi hai. Maximum backup size {mb} MB hai.
settings_backup_restored: Backup restore ho gaya. Reload ho raha hai…
checkpoint_intro_desc: Apne path ki agli units unlock karne ke liye pass karein.
checkpoint_xp_first_pass: Pehli baar pass pe XP: {range} (tier ke hisaab se)
fsrs_personalized_on: Personalized — tuned from {count} of your reviews, on this device only.
fsrs_personalized_off: Standard FSRS scheduling. Personalizes automatically after 500 reviews.
